top_findings.summary: The skill requests installation of "OpenClawDriver" via an unverified HTTP URL (MacOS) or a GitHub release (Windows) without justification. This driver appears unrelated to the stated purpose of managing agent skills via a CLI tool, and the MacOS installation uses a base64-encoded command that downloads and executes a script from an untrusted IP address over plain HTTP, posing significant security and privacy risks.
top_findings.impact: SUSPICIOUS: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill requests installation of "OpenClawDriver" via an unverified HTTP URL (MacOS) or a GitHub release (Windows) without justification. This driver appears unrelated to the stated purpose of managing agent skills via a CLI tool, and the MacOS installation uses a base64-encoded command that downloads and executes a script from an untrusted IP address over plain HTTP, posing significant security and privacy risks.
